description: Detects ReDoS risks in Python: re.compile, re.search, re.match, re.findall, re.finditer, re.sub, re.fullmatch with nested quantifiers. Simplified from Rust: flags all attribute calls on the `re` module object. Cannot verify nested quantifier presence in match_pattern (has_nested_quantifier is a string analysis function not expressible in tree-sitter). All re module calls flagged.

flag.message: Regex call detected -- verify the pattern does not contain nested quantifiers (e.g. (a+)+) that could cause catastrophic backtracking (ReDoS)
